ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupancy_records" (
  "_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "occupancy_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the occupancy was recorded */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization managing the shelter */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific shelter */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility within the shelter */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program operating in the facility */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of occupants at the time of recording */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the facility */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the occupancy record was entered into the system */,
  "entered_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person entering the occupancy record */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Last time the occupancy record was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the occupancy record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_records_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_records_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_records_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelters" (
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shelter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the shelter */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the shelter is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the shelter is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the shelter */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the shelter location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the shelter location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the shelter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter where the facility is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the program serves (e.g., Families, Co-ed, Men) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the program operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program usage record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "occupancy_date" TEXT /* Date and time of program usage */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of occupants using the program */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the user exited the program */,
  "exit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for exiting the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_usage_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "maximum_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the facility capacity was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the facility capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_capacity_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Total occupancy on the report date */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the shelter */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
